steps.title: Link quote to element
steps.content: The goal requires both a quotation and a specific nontraditional design element in Cody's work. The notes identify traditional Diné designs as stripes, zigzags, and diamonds, so a pop-culture or video-game-inspired feature fits the requested nontraditional category better than a diamond pattern.

steps.title: Use the digital-font detail
steps.content: A and C focus on traditional diamond elements. D mentions video-game culture but not a specific design element in the named tapestry. The blocky digital font with pop song lyrics directly connects a visible design choice in Only Love Can Break Your Heart to Cody's quote about growing up in a world of pixelization. The answer is B.
